'''jamushu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycorestoration|mycorestoration]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-m-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycorestoration|mycorestoration]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| jamushu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæmishith|jæmishith]] || [[word:jæmishij|jæmishij]] || [[word:jæmishish|jæmishish]] || [[word:jæmishi|jæmishi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jamumushuth|jamumushuth]] || [[word:jamumushuj|jamumushuj]] || [[word:jamumushush|jamumushush]] || [[word:jamumushu|jamumushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jamushuth|jamushuth]] || [[word:jamushuj|jamushuj]] || [[word:jamushush|jamushush]] || [[word:jamushu|jamushu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jamufshuth|jamufshuth]] || [[word:jamufshuj|jamufshuj]] || [[word:jamufshush|jamufshush]] || [[word:jamufshuf|jamufshuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jamushuthu|jamushuthu]] || [[word:jamushuju|jamushuju]] || [[word:jamushushu|jamushushu]] || [[word:jamushuku|jamushuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jamushuth|jamushuth]] || [[word:jamushuj|jamushuj]] || [[word:jamushush|jamushush]] || [[word:jamushu|jamushu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jamushuthul|jamushuthul]] || [[word:jamushujul|jamushujul]] || [[word:jamushushul|jamushushul]] || [[word:jamushukul|jamushukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jamushuthuthu|jamushuthuthu]] || [[word:jamushujuju|jamushujuju]] || [[word:jamushushushu|jamushushushu]] || [[word:jamushuku|jamushuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jamushuthun|jamushuthun]] || [[word:jamushujun|jamushujun]] || [[word:jamushushun|jamushushun]] || [[word:jamushukun|jamushukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jamushuthuoro|jamushuthuoro]] || [[word:jamushujuoro|jamushujuoro]] || [[word:jamushushuoro|jamushushuoro]] || [[word:jamushukuoro|jamushukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
